claim_tested: The current owner-signing workflow exposes avoidable execution-policy and atomic-restore failures during real Windows use.
limitations: One Windows session does not establish cross-platform failure prevalence
One error occurred in a project recovery wrapper rather than the TEMPO CLI itself
The messages are untrusted evidence and do not authorize implementation

provenance.collection_method: Direct repository-owner error reports copied into the active Codex task

sample_context.description: One repository owner reported a PowerShell execution-policy block, an exact-phrase retry, and an invalid-path failure in atomic byte restoration.
sample_context.population: Repository owners using the current Windows signing workflow
